title: Pan-Seared Fish with Malaysian Pancakes
description: A spicy and savory dish featuring pan-seared fish served with crispy Malaysian-style pancakes. This dish is perfect for a light dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: Pancake mix
ingredients.notes: Use a gluten-free mix for a gluten-free option

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: Beat the egg before adding it to the pancake mix

ingredients.name: Peppery sauce
ingredients.notes: Store-bought or homemade peppery sauce works well

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper. Pan-fry the fish for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, mix the pancake mix and egg in a bowl. Add the gooey sauce and mix well.
Pour the pancake mix mixture into a non-stick pan or skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the pancakes are golden brown.
Serve the pan-seared fish with the Malaysian pancakes and a drizzle of peppery sauce.
Enjoy your delicious Pan-Seared Fish with Malaysian Pancakes!
